page.title: Scoring Rules
page.subtitle: The fixed scoring matrix used to evaluate plan quality

sections.title: How This Scorecard Works
body_markdown_lines: Every metric in the matrix below is scored on a **5-level scale** (unacceptable → marginal → acceptable → good → ideal), each weighted by clinical importance. Your total score is the sum of weighted bin scores across all metrics.
The scorecard is **fixed for every participant**: same structures, same thresholds, same weights. This makes scores directly comparable and trade-offs visible.
